scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev ./dist --compatibility-date=2026-07-02
scripts.pages:env: npx wrangler pages secret bulk .dev.vars --project-name config-studio
scripts.pages:secrets:list: npx wrangler pages secret list --project-name config-studio
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name config-studio
scripts.pages:release: npm run pages:env && npm run pages:deploy
